index.title: Classification Rules
index.description: Manage automatic classification rules used during import preview.

usage.previewOnly: Rules are used only during CSV import preview.
usage.csvFirst: Money Forward CSV categories and subcategories are resolved first.
usage.fillMissing: Rules fill only unresolved categories, subcategories, and reporting flags.
usage.firstMatch: Active rules are evaluated by ascending priority, and only the first match applies.
usage.noManual: Rules are not currently applied to manually entered transactions.

index.addHint: Add rules while confirming a transaction in Category Review. Existing rules can be edited or deleted here.
index.empty: No rules yet. Create one while confirming a transaction in Category Review.

create.title: Create Classification Rule
create.description: Add an automatic classification rule for import preview.

usage.csvFirst: First, resolve categories and subcategories from the CSV category fields.
usage.fillMissing: Then use this rule only to fill unresolved categories, subcategories, or reporting flags.
usage.firstMatch: Active rules are evaluated by ascending priority, and only the first match applies.
usage.noManual: Rules are not currently applied to manually entered transactions.

form.name: Rule Name
form.conditionDescription: Define which import rows this rule should match.
form.transactionTypeHint: Evaluate only import rows with the selected transaction type.
form.matchFieldHint: Choose which import-row value to evaluate.
form.matchValueHint: Rows are evaluated against this text.
form.completionDescription: Fill only unresolved values on matching import rows.
